subcodes.first_line: O friends of ‘Abdu’l-Baha! In his letter, the honorable Ávarih hath spoken most highly of the constancy and firmness of those blessed souls
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء حضرت آواره در نامه خویش نهایت ستایش از ثبوت و رسوخ آن نفوس
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
